examples: Samples containing tiemannite were collected from silicalite ore.
There were crystal substances in the insoluble part, which had high amount of selenium and mercury in the mole ratio of almost 1:1 and was proved to be tiemannite.
Tiemannite has been discovered in the Qiongmo micro-disseminated gold deposit occuring in the Cambrian silicalite and slate in the southern subzone of the Western Qinling Mountains.
